input_text: Mark is an animal. The road leading to the village was narrow. Tallinn is probably in Estonia. Tom wanted to leave. The teacher showed a map to the students. The man standing by the door coughed. The head of every elephant is green. Penguins live in water. The stone was heavy. The tree was cut by the farmer. Frogs are small. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. Mike is very big. The city was destroyed. Earth contains Europe. This book is more interesting than that one. The picture was painted by Leo. Mary visited London in September. John is hardly a baby bird. Some bears eat all berries. Sandra moved to the garden. The letter was written. Mr Dursley is a Muggle. Emily is a cat. Agatha is in trouble. Dole was defeated by Clinton. The length of Nile is 10 meters. These links present the many viewpoints that existed. If X1 is a grandfather of Y1, Y1 is not a child of X1. Winona is a sheep. Jessica is a mouse. Daniel journeyed to the hallway. The song sung by Eve was sad. Did Mary visit Paris?
